burst.msg_body: Could not widen since type i16 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0

burst.msg_body: Inferred burst reverted due to burst accesses data width is different from m_axi port width
burst.ParentFunc: accelerator_net(unsigned int*, unsigned short*, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, int, int, int, int, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_uint<32>, bool)

burst.msg_body: Could not burst due to multiple potential writes to the same bundle in the same region.
burst.ParentFunc: accelerator_net(unsigned int*, unsigned short*, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, int, int, int, int, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_uint<32>, bool)

burst.msg_body: Could not burst due to multiple potential reads to the same bundle in the same region.
burst.ParentFunc: accelerator_net(unsigned int*, unsigned short*, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, int, int, int, int, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_fixed<32, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>, ap_uint<32>, bool)

burst.msg_body: Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 32 in loop 'LOAD_ROW_PTR' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem0'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
